examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi về sở thích cá nhân liên quan đến thể thao. Bạn nên mô tả loại hình thể thao bạn chơi hoặc xem (team vs individual) và lợi ích nó mang lại cho bạn. Hãy sử dụng các cụm từ như 'spectator sport', 'competitive edge', 'foster teamwork' để làm giàu vốn từ. Nếu bạn không chơi thể thao, hãy nói về việc bạn thích xem các trận đấu hoặc rèn luyện sức khỏe bằng cách khác.

band7.text: My absolute favorite sport is football. I love playing it with my friends every weekend because it’s not only a great workout but also a fun way to socialize. Besides football, I also enjoy swimming, which I find very relaxing and good for building lung capacity.
band7.note: Trả lời rõ ràng, nêu được tên các môn thể thao và lợi ích của chúng. Sử dụng tốt các từ vựng phổ thông (socialize, workout, building lung capacity).

band8.text: I’m particularly fond of individual sports like tennis and badminton. I enjoy the competitive edge and the mental focus required to improve my skills. Recently, I’ve also become quite a fan of watching basketball; the fast-paced nature of the game makes it an incredibly exciting spectator sport.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao (competitive edge, mental focus, fast-paced, spectator sport). Cách dẫn đạt trôi chảy và tự nhiên.

band9.text: While I appreciate a diverse range of athletic activities, I’m primarily drawn to competitive swimming. I find the discipline and physical endurance it demands to be profoundly satisfying. Beyond my own participation, I’m also an avid follower of major sporting events like the Olympics. I believe that sports have a unique ability to foster a sense of national pride and a collective spirit of perseverance among participants and viewers alike.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở mức độ chuyên gia (drawn to, discipline, endurance, profoundly satisfying, foster, national pride, collective spirit, perseverance). Cách lập luận tầm vĩ mô và rất tinh tế.

v.meaning: lợi thế cạnh tranh/tinh thần thi đấu
v.example: In business, you need a competitive edge to succeed.

v.meaning: môn thể thao có nhiều khán giả xem
v.example: Football is the most popular spectator sport in the world.

v.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thúc đẩy làm việc nhóm
v.example: Group projects are designed to foster teamwork among students.
Regular swimming is great for building lung capacity and stamina.
Ironman competitions are a true test of physical endurance.
The World Cup is the biggest major sporting event globally.
Winning a gold medal can bring immense national pride.
Success in sports requires talent, hard work, and perseverance.
Archery requires a high degree of mental focus and steady hands.
Basketball is a very fast-paced and exciting game.
Many young people are drawn to extreme sports like skydiving.
Finishing a long hike is profoundly satisfying for many outdoor lovers.
The team’s victory was a result of their incredible collective spirit.

v.meaning: các hoạt động thể thao/điền kinh
v.example: Schools should encourage children to participate in athletic activities.
Joining a basketball club is a great way to socialize and meet new people.

v.meaning: các môn thể thao cá nhân
v.example: Golf and tennis are popular individual sports.

v.meaning: các môn thể thao đồng đội
v.example: Basketball, soccer, and volleyball are all team sports.

v.meaning: nghiệp dư/người làm vì đam mê
v.example: He treats his hobby like a professional, even though he's an amateur.
Professional athletes train for several hours every day.
They played a long match on the clay court.
The football pitch was quite slippery after the rain.
The concert was held in a massive stadium.
She is a gifted athlete who excels at jumping.
The coach gave them some final advice before the game.
His opponent was a very experienced player.
The referee blew the whistle to end the match.
We are planning to enter a national chess tournament.
The whole city celebrated the team’s historic victory.
They suffered a narrow defeat in the final.
He managed to set a new world record for the 100-meter dash.
Someone will eventually break his swimming record.
The award was for those who demonstrated incredible fair play.

v.meaning: tinh thần thể thao nỗ lực/đẹp
v.example: The players showed great sportsmanship after the match.
Extreme sports provide a huge adrenalin kick.
Jogging is a simple and effective way to stay in shape.
As a fitness fanatic, he never misses a day at the gym.
If we want to succeed, we must always play by the rules.
The regulation was meant to ensure a level playing field for all small businesses.
They were much better than the other team and won hands down.
The striker managed to score a goal in the final few minutes.
She is an Olympic gold medalist in track and field.
You need the right sports gear to prevent injuries.
Helmets and pads are essential protective equipment for cycling.
I was completely out of breath after running up the stairs.

v.meaning: bắt đầu quen với cái gì đó
v.example: It took a few weeks for her to get into the swing of the yoga class.
He's really on the ball with all the new regulations.
Don’t jump the gun; we need to wait for further instructions.

v.meaning: người dẫn đầu/ứng viên nặng ký
v.example: She is the front runner for the position of regional manager.
I use an app to keep track of my daily exercise.
A weekend in the mountains was exactly what I needed to recharge my batteries.
